description: Apply public repo-complete hardening to the static personal site repository, verify privacy/readiness, and make GitHub metadata public-ready.
acceptance: repo_complete public validate has no hard blockers or any remaining blockers are explicitly proven false-positive/out-of-scope.
GitHub metadata is public-ready and visibility is handled deliberately.

evidence.summary: Public repo-complete scaffold applied; GitHub visibility/description/homepage/topics set public-ready; npm run check passed; repo-local validate/readback passed; repo_complete public validate is DEELTIJD only due documented filename false positives in docs/public-readiness-review.md.
